ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Completed, Accepted) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "milestone_count" INTEGER /* Number of milestones in the project */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the project */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the project */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* The comment text providing details or feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Completed, Accepted) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status for better understanding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being assigned */,
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member assigned to the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member in the project (e.g., Developer, Manager) */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team member was assigned */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_assignments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
